HeroSection.p: Professional makeup artist based in Varna, Bulgaria

WhoAmI.desc:
My name is Kristina (Krisi) and I am a professional makeup artist.
I have lived in France for nearly 10 years and graduated from FORMABEAUTE École in Toulon with a specialization in aesthetics, where I lived for three years.
I love to travel and draw inspiration from different cultures, using makeup to enhance each woman’s natural beauty.

construction.title: Makeup 💄
construction.description: Professional makeup for every occasion – from soft, natural looks to bold and glamorous transformations.

waxing.title: Waxing & Sugaring ✨
waxing.description: Gentle hair removal with traditional wax or natural sugar paste for silky smooth skin.

facials.title: Facial Treatments 🧖‍♀️
facials.description: Personalized facial treatments to refresh your skin and restore its natural glow.

self-makeup.title: Self-Makeup Lessons 🎨
self-makeup.description: Individual lessons where you'll learn how to highlight your beauty easily and confidently.

packages.title: Packages 🎁
packages.description: The perfect combination of services in convenient packages that highlight your uniqueness.
